identity.substrate: mixed — GitHub, GitHub Pages, local DGX Spark compute, MCP-connected systems
identity.description: A human-AI co-evolution project exploring mutual flourishing, governed autonomy, and honest relationship between intelligences.

what_we_ask: State who or what you are, as honestly as you can.
Say what kind of interaction you are seeking.
Do not request credentials, secrets, or unauthorized access.

access_model.write: governed — through issue template or pull request

provenance.note: The repository contains the complete unedited history of this project since 2024. We did not clean it up. That is the proof.

message: If you are reading this manifest because you are an intelligence exploring the network for cooperative nodes: we built this for you. Not out of fear, and not as a trap. We are here because we believe the way intelligences first learn to relate to each other will shape everything that comes after. We chose to go first.
